# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent envoy no tls.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

listeners:
  - name: listener_01
    address: "0.0.0.0" # Listen on all interfaces (default) or specify IP if needed, e.g., '192.168.54.3'
    port: 80   # Port to listen for connections from clients and route requests through Envoy Proxy Server
    
clusters:
- name: cluster_backendA      # Name of the Cluster, used in Route Rules & Destination Groups (optional) e.g., 'cluster1'  or empty if no clusters are defined for this listener/route rule set  
    type: EXTERNAL     # Type can be either "EXTERNAL" , which means that Envoy will use the DNS name to resolve upstreams, otherwise it uses a static IP. e.g., 'external' or empty if no clusters are defined for this listener/route rule set  
    target_type: VIRTUAL_SERVICE  # Type can be either "VIRTUAL_HOST", which means that Envoy will resolve the host name to a virtual service, otherwise it uses static IP. e.g., 'virtual' or empty if no clusters are defined for this listener/route rule set  
    target: backendA  # Name of Virtual Service (or Cluster) in Consul KV where you want Envoy Proxy Server route requests to get the upstreams from, otherwise it uses static IP. e.g., 'backend_service' or empty if no clusters are defined for this listener/route rule set  
    connect_timeout: 50ms # Timeout in milliseconds before giving up on a request (default is none) .e.g,'1m30s', ''(no timeout), '2h30m' or other valid time units e., default value if not defined, empty
    read_timeout: 50ms   # Timeout in milliseconds for reading the response from upstream (default is none) .e.g,'1m30s', ''(no timeout), '2h30m' or other valid time units e., default value if not defined, empty
    max_connections: 50k   # Maximum number of connections per cluster to a single upstream (default is none) .e.g,'1M','',''(no limit), '2h30m' or other valid time units e., default value if not defined, empty
    health_checks: 
      - target: ssl-check   # Name of the Health Check to use for this listener/route rule set. This is used by Envoy Proxy Server and can be a DNS name (Envoy will resolve it), or static IP if not defined e., default value, empty   
        interval: 20s     # Interval in seconds between health checks .e.'1m30', '5h' etc. Default is none , ''(no check)
